cfo_decision_summary.financial_position: AI token spend is justified by strong productivity and quality gains, but immediate controls are needed to address overspending and waste concentration.
finance_controls_to_apply: Set monthly token budget thresholds by team and user segment.
Require review for high-spend users below ROI threshold.
Preserve access for high-ROI users and replicate their workflows.
Downgrade or pause premium usage where ROI remains low after remediation.

summary: AI spend delivers a 29.7% productivity gain and 26.5% bug reduction, supporting continued investment.
Current run rate is 81.7% of budget, with next month forecast at 97% utilization—budget risk is rising.
42.2% of tokens are consumed by 7 overspenders with weak ROI; this is the primary source of waste.
High-value features and senior/expert employees yield the best ROI; low-value features and junior users underperform.
Immediate financial controls and spend caps on low-ROI users/features will reduce waste and extend runway.

diagnosis.message: Overspending is concentrated among a small group of users with low ROI, creating significant budget risk.
AI spend is approaching budget limits, requiring proactive monitoring to avoid overruns.
Premium models (gpt-4.1) are used for low-complexity tasks, increasing costs unnecessarily.
Three features consume high token volumes with low business value, indicating misallocated spend.

issue_cards.headline: Overspenders consume 42.2% of employee tokens while producing weak ROI.

problem_details.why_it_matters: This is the clearest finance control opportunity: high consumption with low measured output.

recommended_solution.action: Set spend caps for low-ROI high spenders and require manager review before premium usage is expanded.

issue_cards.headline: AI spend is at 81.7% of budget and next month is forecast at 29114.5.

problem_details.why_it_matters: Spend is still justified, but the run rate is close enough to budget to require controls.

recommended_solution.action: Approve current budget but add monthly alerts by provider, model, team, and user segment.

issue_cards.headline: gpt-4.1 is the highest-cost model in the current mix.

problem_details.why_it_matters: Model routing can reduce cost without cutting AI access if simple tasks move to cheaper models.

recommended_solution.action: Route low-complexity use cases to cheaper models and reserve premium models for high-value features.

issue_cards.headline: 3 feature(s) show high token usage with low estimated business value.

problem_details.why_it_matters: AI spend should be concentrated on revenue growth, cost savings, or critical delivery outcomes.

recommended_solution.action: Require business-value tagging before approving premium model usage on low-priority features.

recommended_action_plan.title: Overspender Controls
recommended_action_plan.action: Set spend caps for low-ROI, high-token users and require manager review for premium model access.
recommended_action_plan.expected_effect: Estimated 12% reduction in monthly AI spend and improved ROI.

recommended_action_plan.title: Business-Value Tagging
recommended_action_plan.action: Require business-value tagging before approving premium model usage on features.
recommended_action_plan.expected_effect: Estimated 6% reduction in AI spend on low-value features.

recommended_action_plan.title: Model Routing Optimization
recommended_action_plan.action: Route low-complexity tasks to lower-cost models and restrict premium models to high-value features.
recommended_action_plan.expected_effect: Estimated 10% reduction in model-related AI spend.

recommended_action_plan.title: Budget Monitoring Alerts
recommended_action_plan.action: Implement monthly budget alerts by provider, model, team, and user segment.
recommended_action_plan.expected_effect: Enables early detection of budget overruns; no direct spend reduction.

roi_score.estimate: business_output_generated / token_spend, blended with quality and productivity scores

assumptions.name: Monthly AI spend reduction from controls
assumptions.rationale: Based on concentration of waste among overspenders and historical reduction rates from spend caps.

assumptions.name: Additional reduction from business-value tagging
assumptions.rationale: Conservative estimate reflecting low-value feature spend as a share of total.

assumptions.name: Model routing optimization savings
assumptions.rationale: Estimated from current premium model overuse and achievable mix shift.

assumptions.name: Productivity lift from AI usage
assumptions.rationale: Supported by measured productivity gain after AI adoption.

assumptions.name: baseline_monthly_revenue_growth
assumptions.rationale: Conservative default for do-nothing revenue projection.

assumptions.name: baseline_monthly_ai_spend_growth
assumptions.rationale: Derived from current spend versus previous 12-month average.

assumptions.name: action_plan_productivity_lift
assumptions.rationale: Capped aggregate lift from action plan items.

assumptions.name: action_plan_ai_spend_reduction
assumptions.rationale: Capped aggregate spend reduction from action plan items.

assumptions.name: action_plan_bug_reduction
assumptions.rationale: Capped aggregate quality improvement from action plan items.
